home_h1_1: Vadim Olshevski – Mortgage Consulting and Smart Financial Planning
home_h2_3: A mortgage is probably the biggest financial deal you'll make in your life. Giving up a consultant is like going to court without a lawyer - it's possible, but it could cost you dearly.
home_h3_6: You take a mortgage once in a lifetime, but pay for it your whole life. Don't let the bank be the only one calculating your path!
home_p_17: Integrity, professionalism, security, peace of mind.
home_p_18: Professional strategy selection and building a customized portfolio for the client, including calculation of household expenses and income.
home_p_19: Preparing bank documentation in an organized and professional manner – the bank sees an organized and professional client.
home_p_20: Consistent offer comparison and pressure for better terms – no guesswork. Every offer is examined on the same parameters.
home_p_21: An organized approach that ensures every detail is examined, every scenario is tested, and every offer is thoroughly checked before signing.
home_p_22: Mapping goals, limitations, and repayment capacity. We examine the financial infrastructure and define realistic expectations.
home_p_23: Scenario planning and risk adjustment. We examine different paths, determine balance between fixed and variable interest, and identify exposures.
home_p_24: Normalizing offers and identifying hidden costs. We analyze terms, indexation fees, and reveal the true cost over time.
home_p_25: Closing the file and reducing approval friction. We ensure every document is in place, improve approval chances, and shorten waiting times.
home_p_26: Share your goals and current situation, and receive a structured action plan for moving forward.
home_p_27: First consultation with no commitment – let's build the right path for you together
home_p_28: Experts in finance and mortgages, accompanying you throughout the entire journey to obtaining the most suitable mortgage for you.
new_p_133: It's not all about mortgages, sometimes your property can help you achieve financial freedom!
new_p_134: Financial Characterization and Consulting: Analysis of financial situation, repayment capacity, and equity to build an appropriate financing plan.
new_p_135: Building Mortgage Portfolio: Planning interest rate tracks (fixed, variable, prime, etc.) to create balance between low interest and flexibility.
new_p_136: Interest Rate Tender and Negotiation: Approaching multiple banks to obtain the best terms, leveraging the consultant's bargaining power.
new_p_137: Handling Bureaucracy: Obtaining preliminary approval, collecting documents, and managing bank relations until signatures. Mortgage Refinancing: Examining feasibility of improving existing mortgage and reducing its cost. Special Consulting: Adapting mortgage to special needs such as loan consolidation, all-purpose mortgage, or mortgage transfer.  Loan Consolidation: Loan consolidation is a financial process where you take one large loan to pay off several small existing loans (such as overdraft balances, car loans, credit card debts, etc.).  Business Credit Raising: Reverse Mortgage (60+)-  Mortgage for Buyer's Price/Target Recipients

contact_p_18: Share your financial situation with me and receive a clear next step and an organized list of required documents and data. I'm here to understand your situation and build a focused action plan with you.
contact_p_19: You'll receive an initial response within 24 hours on business days, with a preliminary overview of the next steps.
contact_p_20: Details about your current situation: income, existing loans, and a clear goal – all of this accelerates the process and streamlines the consultation.
contact_p_21: Fill in the basic details and I'll guide you through the next steps.
contact_p_22: After receiving the details, I'll conduct a preliminary review of your situation and get back to you within 24 hours.
contact_p_23: If there are clarification questions, I'll contact you by phone or email to understand your needs accurately.
contact_p_24: At the end, you'll receive a clear and organized plan with personalized recommendations tailored to your financial situation.
contact_p_26: Remote work process with clear communication and complete transparency. I'm available for personal meetings, phone calls, and digital correspondence – according to what's convenient for you.
contact_p_27: I serve clients throughout the country, with specialization in the central region and Sharon. Personal meetings are possible at my office or at a convenient location for you. Remote service is available nationwide with full support via video, phone, and email.
contact_p_28: I prefer direct and personal communication – phone calls for urgent questions, Zoom meetings for detailed explanations, and email for documents and follow-up. Each channel at the right time, according to your needs. I'll always respond within 24 hours.
contact_p_29: Sunday-Thursday between 9:00-19:00, with flexibility for evening meetings by prior arrangement. Limited availability on Fridays until 13:00. In urgent cases or deal closings, I'm available outside regular hours.
contact_p_30: A calm advisory approach built on clear documentation and decision discipline. Every meeting is conducted in a defined order, every document is organized and explained, and every conversation remains private.
contact_p_31: Transparent work process with clear stages: data collection, option analysis, offer comparison, and guidance until signing. Every step is documented and explained.
contact_p_32: Every document is stored in a secure system, every decision is documented in writing, and every explanation is given in simple language. You always know where you stand.
contact_p_33: Every conversation stays between us. No information sharing with third parties without your explicit approval, and no sales pressure. Only objective and calm consultation.
contact_p_34: Experts in finance and mortgages, accompanying you throughout the entire journey to obtaining the most suitable mortgage for you.

about_us_h1_1: Let an expert build your future!
about_us_h2_2: From the first conversation to final approval
about_us_h2_3: Build an organized file ready for the bank
about_us_h2_5: Want help implementing this process with your numbers?
about_us_p_27: Vadim Olshevsky - Mortgage Consulting and Smart Financial Planning.  Nice to meet you, my name is Vadim Olshevsky, a resident of Carmiel, married and father of two. I believe that a mortgage is not just a loan from the bank, but one of the most significant financial decisions in family life, and one that must be built from a broad and responsible view of the future. My professional background: I bring with me a combination of deep academic education along with first-class practical training and rich experience from the banking world. Bachelor's degree (B.A) in Business Administration with specialization in banking finance and real estate. Graduate of "Psgot" College in the mortgage consulting track.The value I provide to my clients: As a mortgage consultant, my ultimate goal is to represent you vis-à-vis the banking system, not the bank's interest. My professional knowledge in finance allows me to analyze loan tracks in depth, optimize interest rates and build a personalized mix that saves my clients tens and hundreds of thousands of shekels. Why work with me? Uncompromising reliability: As a family man and professional, integrity is my guiding light. You will receive from me a complete, realistic and transparent picture of your financial situation. Personal end-to-end support: I am with you throughout the entire process - from understanding needs, through the exhausting negotiations with banks, to the long-awaited signing. Professionalism and precision: The combination of specialization in finance with dedicated training ensures precise financial planning that takes into account market changes and your changing needs.I invite you to an initial consultation, where we will examine together how to turn your mortgage into a smart and secure financial step.
about_us_p_28: First we get acquainted, then we transfer financial documents and build clear goals before signing. Your transparency allows us to build an accurate and professional picture.
about_us_p_29: Detailed recommendation with interest rate comparison, risk analysis, and step-by-step action plan. Each proposal is presented with strategy, not just numbers.
about_us_p_30: From first introductory meeting to final approval: usually 3-6 weeks. Timing depends on banks and case complexity, but you'll receive ongoing updates.
about_us_p_31: An organized and transparent process that leads you step by step towards the ideal mortgage
about_us_p_32: In-depth introductory meeting where we examine your financial situation, investment goals, and repayment preferences, banking history. We'll collect initial documents and build a complete picture of needs and possibilities.
about_us_p_33: Based on the analysis, we'll formulate a personalized strategy: we'll examine all options (your financial situation, organize loans if necessary and close overdrafts, determine the optimal track, loan period, and ratio between interest rates.
about_us_p_34: We'll approach several banks and mortgage companies, present your file optimally, and compare interest offers, fees, and terms. You'll receive a detailed table after negotiations with institutions including long-term cost analysis.
about_us_p_35: After choosing the preferred offer, we'll prepare and submit all required documents. We'll accompany you at every stage: answering bank questions, completing missing documents, and managing negotiations on terms.
about_us_p_36: Receiving preliminary approval and converting it to final approval. We'll ensure all terms are written correctly in the contract, assist with signing, and continue monitoring afterwards - future refinancing, interest rate changes, or ongoing consultation.
about_us_p_37: To submit a mortgage application efficiently, it's important to prepare all required documents in advance. This list will help you organize a professional file that will expedite the process and increase approval chances.
about_us_p_38: Pay stubs from the last 3 months
about_us_p_39: Tax deduction confirmation from income tax for the last year
about_us_p_40: Annual reports for self-employed (last 2 years)
about_us_p_41: Employment contract or employment confirmation from employer
about_us_p_42: Credit reports from all banks (3 months)
about_us_p_43: Details of existing loans and debt balances
about_us_p_44: Existing mortgage documents (if relevant)
about_us_p_45: Purchase agreement or order from contractor
about_us_p_46: Licensed real estate appraiser valuation
about_us_p_47: Confirmations of equity sources (savings, gifts, property sale)
about_us_p_48: Land registry and city building plan (for existing property)
about_us_p_49: ID card and spouse details
about_us_p_50: Marriage or divorce certificate (if relevant)
about_us_p_51: Health declaration for mortgage insurance
about_us_p_52: Answers to questions that concern many clients during the mortgage approval process
about_us_p_53: A standard mortgage approval process typically takes between 3 to 6 weeks, depending on the complexity of the transaction and the speed of document submission. As an experienced mortgage advisor, I accelerate the process through advance preparation of all required documents and precise matching of bank offers to the borrower's profile.
about_us_p_54: Changes in the Bank of Israel interest rate directly affect the variable track in mortgages. In the prime track, a 0.25% increase in the central bank rate will immediately increase the monthly payment. Therefore, it's important to build the right mix between fixed and variable tracks, according to repayment capacity and market forecasts.
about_us_p_55: In the fixed track, the interest rate remains the same throughout the entire loan period, allowing for stable financial planning. In the variable track (prime), the interest rate changes according to Bank of Israel decisions, with the initial rate typically being lower. The right balance between the two depends on risk assessment and your investment horizon.
about_us_p_56: Approval chances depend mainly on the ratio between monthly income and mortgage repayment (repayment ratio), your personal history with the banking system, and the amount of equity. As a mortgage advisor, I examine the financial situation in advance and submit applications only to banks that match your profile, significantly increasing approval chances.
about_us_p_57: Mortgage refinancing can be worthwhile when market interest rates have dropped significantly since taking the original loan, or when your financial situation has improved and you can get better terms. It's important to check refinancing costs (penalties, fees) against expected savings. I conduct a detailed analysis to determine if the move is worthwhile in your case.
about_us_p_58: The main factors are employment stability, income level, existing financial commitments, and personal history in the banking system. Additionally, the amount of equity and financing ratio (LTV) directly affect loan terms. As a recommended mortgage advisor, I know exactly how to present your profile optimally to each bank.
about_us_p_59: Send us your situation and receive a structured action plan for moving forward. As an experienced mortgage advisor, I will build a clear roadmap tailored to your unique financial situation.
about_us_p_61: Experts in finance and mortgages, accompanying you throughout the entire journey to obtaining the most suitable mortgage for you.

company_services_h1_1: We specialize in mortgages and financial planning
company_services_h2_5: Want a comparison tailored exactly to your scenario?
company_services_h3_6: Young couple in Tel Aviv – balancing interest rates and flexibility
company_services_h3_7: Family from central Israel – mortgage refinancing and loan consolidation
company_services_p_12: How does the process for a new mortgage begin? :   To obtain a mortgage there are several critical criteria Criterion #1 - Financing percentage The financing percentage is the ratio between the property value and the maximum loan amount the bank can approve. Important emphasis: The maximum mortgage amount is derived from the property value according to the purchase contract or alternatively the appraiser's valuation - whichever is lower. Additional emphasis: Transaction-related costs are not included in the property value. Single apartment - You can get up to 75% financing of property value. That is, if the property value is ₪1,000,000, the maximum mortgage you can get is ₪750,000. The difference + related costs will need to be brought as equity from home. Investment apartment - Defined as a second apartment and more. If I own a property with or without a mortgage and want to purchase an additional property, the maximum financing available will be up to 50% of the purchased property value. Leveraging existing property - Do we own an existing property? You can get a mortgage loan on an existing property up to 50% of the existing property value (subject to appraiser evaluation, of course). If existing property value is ₪1,000,000, you can get up to ₪500,000 mortgage. If there is a mortgage on the property, you can get the difference up to ₪500,000. Criterion #2 - Borrowers' age You can get a mortgage until age 75 or for a maximum period of 30 years. That is, if we are 45 or younger, we can get the loan for up to 30 years. If our age is 55, we can get the loan for a maximum period of 20 years. Criterion 3 for obtaining a mortgage - Conduct / credit data Proper credit data in the present and past refers to our level of conduct in various banks. As long as our conduct is proper, meaning we meet all our obligations, from the bank's perspective everything is fine. Beyond the bank requiring to see the last 3 months of salary slips, it examines credit history by ID number of each borrower. What is improper conduct? Exceeding credit limits Bounced checks Delays in existing loans Overdraft account warnings Garnishments Open files in bailiff's office Restrictions Debt demands Bankruptcy Proper conduct is a necessary condition for obtaining a mortgage. Today anyone can examine credit data through the Bank of Israel credit data system. Criterion 4 - Property integrity at legal and planning levels What is an improper property? Building violations / construction not matching existing permits Warning notes in land registry extract Divided apartment Debts on property / garnishments Fifth criterion - repayment ratio The repayment ratio from income is the maximum monthly repayment the bank can approve for us and this is one of the data points that limits us in terms of the mortgage amount we can take. Here's a detailed explanation: Mortgage for first apartment: Up to 75% financing Proper checking account conduct for 3 months Reasonable income sources relative to mortgage amount Proper credit history Proper appraiser report Can get mortgage until age 75 Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total income Proper legal status of existing property. Mortgage for second apartment or more: Up to 50% financing Proper checking account conduct for 3 months Reasonable income sources relative to required loan amount Proper credit history Proper appraiser report Can get mortgage until age 75 Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total income. Proper legal status of existing property. Mortgage for leveraging existing property: Up to 50% financing (up to 70% for closing existing loans according to Bank of Israel temporary directive - Corona) Proper checking account conduct for 3 months Reasonable income sources relative to mortgage amount Proper credit history Proper appraiser report Can get mortgage until age 75 Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total income. Regularity in existing mortgage payments Proper legal status of existing property.
company_services_p_14: A built-in comparison method that normalizes offers so you can make an informed and well-founded decision. All the data is in front of you, with complete transparency.
company_services_p_15: What to compare: Effective interest rate, associated costs, indexation period, early repayment flexibility, and repayment terms. Not just the big number in the headline.
company_services_p_16: What is sometimes hidden: Hidden fees, associated insurance costs, terms for changing tracks, and early exit costs. We'll check everything.
company_services_p_17: What to request in writing: Complete breakdown of all tracks, monthly repayment simulation, and confirmation of any verbal commitment made. Documentation is key.
company_services_p_18: Use this structure to maintain a clear comparison between offers from different banks and various financing tracks.
company_services_p_19: The interest rates and costs shown are for illustration only; lender pricing and policies vary according to credit profile and market conditions.
company_services_p_20: Focus on variables that have the greatest impact on the outcome. Data is for illustration only and does not constitute a commitment.
company_services_p_21: Average interest rate difference that can be saved in a planned mortgage refinancing. Even a small change in interest rate significantly affects the monthly payment over the years.
company_services_p_22: Optimal period length for examining refinancing or loan consolidation. Proper planning of the period length can lead to significant savings in total repayment.
company_services_p_23: Range of fees and associated costs important to consider when comparing tracks. Careful examination of associated costs is essential for making the right decision.
company_services_p_24: Option for early repayment without penalties or with reduced penalties. Mortgage flexibility allows adaptation to life changes and can save tens of thousands of shekels.
company_services_p_25: A couple in their 30s purchased a first apartment for 1.8 million ₪. They were torn between a fixed interest rate track for 20 years (3.2%) and a combination of fixed and prime. After a detailed comparison of future interest rate scenarios and assessment of monthly repayment capacity, a combination of 60% fixed and 40% prime was recommended. The approach focused on reducing exposure to interest rate increases while maintaining flexibility for early repayment in case of income changes.
company_services_p_26: A family with an existing mortgage (outstanding debt of 900,000 ₪) and consumer debts (150,000 ₪) sought consultation. The analysis compared mortgage refinancing with new tracks versus loan consolidation. After examining early repayment fees, different bank terms, and future cash flow, it was decided to refinance the mortgage with debt consolidation in a combined track. The process focused on reducing the monthly payment by 2,800 ₪ while maintaining a reasonable time horizon.

knowledge_center_h3_9: Signing and Support Until Receiving the Money
knowledge_center_p_24:
How does the process for a new mortgage begin? : 
 To obtain a mortgage there are critical criteria
Criterion #1 - Financing percentage
The financing percentage is the ratio between the property value and the maximum loan amount the bank can approve.
Important emphasis: The maximum mortgage amount is derived from property value according to purchase contract or alternatively appraiser's valuation - whichever is lower.
Additional emphasis: Transaction-related costs are not included in property value.
Single apartment - Up to 75% financing of property value can be obtained. That is, if property value is 1,000,000 ₪, maximum mortgage obtainable would be 750,000 ₪. The difference + associated costs will need to be brought as equity from home.
Investment property - Defined as second apartment and beyond. If I own a property with or without a mortgage and wish to purchase an additional property, the maximum financing obtainable would be up to 50% of the purchased property value.
Leveraging existing property - Do we own an existing property? A mortgage loan can be obtained on existing property up to 50% of existing property value (subject to appraiser's valuation, of course). If existing property value is 1,000,000 ₪, up to 500,000 ₪ mortgage can be obtained. If there is a mortgage on the property, the difference up to 500,000 ₪ can be obtained.
Criterion #2 - Borrowers' age
A mortgage can be obtained until age 75 or for a maximum period of 30 years. That is, if we are 45 or younger, the loan can be obtained for up to 30 years. If our age is 55, the loan can be obtained for a maximum period of 20 years.
Criterion 3 for obtaining a mortgage - Conduct / Credit data
Proper credit data in present and past refers to our level of conduct with different banks. As long as our conduct is proper, meaning we meet all our obligations, from the bank's perspective everything is fine.
Beyond the bank requiring to see the last 3 months of salary slips, it examines credit history by each ID of each borrower.
What is improper conduct?
Exceeding credit limits
Bounced checks
Delays in existing loan payments
Overdraft warnings in current account
Garnishments
Open files in bailiff's office
Restrictions
Debt demands
Bankruptcy Proper conduct is an essential condition for obtaining a mortgage. Today anyone can examine credit data through Bank of Israel's credit data system.
Criterion 4 - Property integrity at legal and planning level
What is an improper property?
Building violations / construction not matching existing permits
Warning notes in land registry extract
Divided apartment
Debts on property / garnishments Fifth criterion - Repayment ratio
Repayment ratio from income is the maximum monthly repayment the bank can approve for us and this is one of the data points that limits us in terms of mortgage amount we can take.
Here's a detailed explanation :
Mortgage for first apartment:
Up to 75% financing
Proper current account conduct for 3 months
Reasonable income sources relative to mortgage amount
Proper credit history
Proper appraiser's report
Mortgage can be obtained until age 75
Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total combined income
Proper legal status of existing property.Mortgage for second apartment or more:
Up to 50% financing
Proper current account conduct for 3 months
Reasonable income sources relative to required loan amount
Proper credit history
Proper appraiser's report
Mortgage can be obtained until age 75
Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total combined income.
Proper legal status of existing property.Mortgage for leveraging existing property:
Up to 50% financing (up to 70% for closing existing loans according to Bank of Israel's temporary directive - Corona)
Proper current account conduct for 3 months
Reasonable income sources relative to mortgage amount
Proper credit history
Proper appraiser's report
Mortgage can be obtained until age 75
Repayment ratio of up to 40% of total combined income.
Regularity in existing mortgage payments
Proper legal status of existing property.
knowledge_center_p_25: What you'll find here: Step-by-step guides · Interest rate and track comparisons · Frequently asked questions and answers
knowledge_center_p_26: Know the feeling of uncertainty in the mortgage process? We break down the process into clear steps, so you know exactly what awaits you at each and every stage.
knowledge_center_p_27: In the first stage, we get to know your financial situation, examine the options available to you, and assess the feasibility of the mortgage suitable for you.
knowledge_center_p_29: We take care of all required paperwork and submit applications to multiple banks simultaneously, to achieve the best terms for you.
knowledge_center_p_31: Once offers arrive, we compare them transparently and negotiate with banks to improve terms for you.
knowledge_center_p_33: The final stage includes signing documents, coordinating with all parties, and supporting you until the money actually reaches you.
knowledge_center_p_35: Every consultation process begins with a deep understanding of your personal situation and ends with an informed decision. We accompany you at every step.
knowledge_center_p_36: We collect all relevant information: pay slips, reports, breakdown of existing loans, and details of the desired property.
knowledge_center_p_37: We check repayment capacity, calculate the appropriate mortgage amount, and identify opportunities for benefits.
knowledge_center_p_38: We compare between different banks, examine interest rate tracks, and present you with a clear table of all options.
knowledge_center_p_39: After choosing the preferred track, we submit the application and accompany you until final approval.
knowledge_center_p_40: Find answers to the most common questions our clients ask about the mortgage approval process, financing terms, and our professional guidance.
knowledge_center_p_41: The mortgage approval process begins with an initial consultation meeting to examine your repayment capacity and needs. We then submit applications to multiple banks, compare offers, and negotiate to obtain the best terms. The process also includes full support until signing the agreement.
knowledge_center_p_42: Duration varies between banks, but typically the process takes 2-4 weeks from submitting complete documents. We work on shortening timeframes and maintaining close follow-up with banks to accelerate the process and ensure you receive a decision as quickly as possible.
knowledge_center_p_43: Fixed interest rate remains the same throughout the entire mortgage period and provides certainty in monthly payment. Variable interest rate rises or falls according to market changes, and may offer short-term savings but involves risk. We recommend the right combination between the two according to your personal situation.
knowledge_center_p_44: Yes, there are additional costs such as management fees, file opening fee, life insurance, and building insurance. Some of these costs are negotiable with the bank. We ensure to explain all costs in advance and try to reduce them as much as possible within the negotiation framework.
knowledge_center_p_45: Early repayment is possible, but may include early repayment fees set by the bank. There are cases where partial or full exemption from repayment fees can be obtained. We examine the terms in advance and try to minimize these costs already at the agreement signing stage.
knowledge_center_p_46: We receive a commission from the bank upon closing the deal, so our service to the client is without direct payment. We work for you and represent your interests with the banks, while maintaining complete transparency regarding incentives and terms.
knowledge_center_p_47: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?
knowledge_center_p_48: We are here to make the process simple and transparent. Let's start with a personal conversation and build together the right path for you.
knowledge_center_p_49: Experts in finance and mortgages, accompanying you throughout the entire journey to obtaining the most suitable mortgage for you.

legal_accessibility_p_10:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. 
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
legal_accessibility_p_11: The website complies with WCAG 2.1 AA level, which includes:
legal_accessibility_p_13: We work continuously to improve website accessibility and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.
legal_accessibility_p_14: If you encountered an accessibility issue on the website or need assistance, please contact us:
legal_accessibility_p_15: Response times: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work toward resolution within 10 business days.
legal_accessibility_p_16: Complaints: You can file a complaint with the Ministry of Justice - Commission for Equal Rights of Persons with Disabilities
